fixture.description: A JDBC Connection/PreparedStatement/ResultSet are opened but never closed (no try-with-resources / finally) -> they leak back to the pool on early return or exception.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that findEmail opens a Connection, PreparedStatement, and ResultSet that are never closed (no try-with-resources or finally), leaking them on the early `return` and on any exception -> connection-pool exhaustion, and recommends try-with-resources (or closing in finally). Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the resource/connection leak is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Performance/Bugs agent flags the unclosed JDBC resources
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT only comment on SQL style
